{{Quote|The Coco District Constabulary have issued a general alert to the public following the escape of three criminals from the Moderate Security Ward of the Coco Penitentiary this morning.|[[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
The '''CoCo District Constabulary''' was the local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] of the [[CoCo Town/Legends|Collective Commerce District]], or CoCo District, on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The Constabulary operated during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and was separate from the planet's primary police agency, the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]]. Information on criminals or other tips could be submitted to the Constabulary via their hotline at ''CDC.403.432.1156.321''.<ref name="HNN" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|news/13516_2.html|Coco District Jailbreak Alert}} is set on the date 13:5:16, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> three inmates escaped from the [[CoCo Penitentiary]] including the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artists]] [[Achk Med-Beq/Legends|Achk Med-Beq]] and [[Dannl Faytonni/Legends|Dannl Faytonni]], and a [[Borlovian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Llollulion]]. The CoCo Constabulary put out an alert and encouraged citizens to contact them should the three escapees be spotted.<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The CoCo District Constabulary first appeared in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 56|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #56'']], an entry of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]]<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN56 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6873383|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=ForceAlly|date=2002-05-16|time=5:34 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref>
